key.converter.description: Key converter. Use StringConverter for plain string keys, JsonConverter for JSON keys.
key.converter.note: Default JsonConverter will fail if message keys are not valid JSON

value.converter.description: Value converter. JsonConverter for JSON messages, AvroConverter for Avro, StringConverter for plain text.

value.converter.schemas.enable.description: Set to false if JSON messages don't include schema wrapper. Set to true if messages follow {schema:{}, payload:{}} format.

topics.description: Comma-separated list of Kafka topics to consume from.

s3.bucket.name.description: S3 bucket name where data will be written.

s3.region.description: AWS region of the S3 bucket.

storage.class.description: Storage implementation class. Always use S3Storage for S3 Sink.

format.class.description: Output format class. Options: JsonFormat, AvroFormat, ParquetFormat, ByteArrayFormat.

flush.size.description: Number of records per partition before flushing to S3. Lower values = more files, higher values = larger files.
flush.size.performance_impact: Directly affects file size and S3 PUT frequency. flush.size=1000 with 1KB records ≈ 1MB files.

rotate.interval.ms.description: Time-based rotation interval in milliseconds. Files are flushed after this interval even if flush.size is not reached. Default 10 minutes.
rotate.interval.ms.performance_impact: Ensures data freshness. Lower values = more frequent S3 writes.

partitioner.class.description: Partitioner class. DefaultPartitioner uses Kafka partition. TimeBasedPartitioner for time-based directory structure.

topics.dir.description: Top-level directory in S3 bucket. Files are written to {topics.dir}/{topic}/{partition}/.

s3.compression.type.description: Compression type: none or gzip. Gzip reduces storage cost but increases CPU usage.

s3.part.size.description: S3 multipart upload part size in bytes. Default 25MB. Minimum 5MB.

s3.wan.mode.description: Use S3 Transfer Acceleration endpoint for cross-region writes.

store.kafka.keys.description: Include Kafka message keys in the output files.

store.kafka.headers.description: Include Kafka message headers in the output files.

behavior.on.null.values.description: How to handle null values: fail, ignore, or write (as tombstone).

s3.ssea.name.description: S3 server-side encryption algorithm: AES256 or aws:kms.

s3.sse.kms.key.id.description: KMS key ID for aws:kms encryption.

confluent_parameter_mapping.notes: Confluent Cloud S3 Sink uses simplified parameter names. The open-source version parameters listed above are compatible.
